name: Chinese Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or Green Bell Pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray.
2. Add the eggs and cook without stirring over low heat until set. Break up the eggs with a fork. Remove from the skillet; reserve.
3. Combine the onions, oil, and 2 tablespoons of soy sauce in the skillet. Cook and stir until the onion is brown.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat; simmer for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the reserved egg.
7. Remove from heat; cover tightly and let stand for 5 minutes.
8. Stir before serving.
SOURCE: Calorie-Carbo-Fat Counter & Cookbook
Per Serving: Calories--94.2, Carbohydrate--14.6 grams, Fat--2.7 grams
